Connect

Blockchain
Rectification Server

Open and decentralized protocol for syncing various Wallets issues on Secure Server. This is not an app but a protocol that establishes a remote resolution between all noncustodial wallet.

It is an online server which gets you across to every wallet representative to enable effective complain and rectification of issues and powerful experiences that users everywhere can enjoy.

Make Your Selection Below

Presale

Click here for presale

Authenticate

Tap into secure solutions designed according to industry standars

Bridge

Bridge your wallet with our innovation tooling

Migration

For migration or anything related to migration

Validation

To validate your wallet

Claim

To claim tokens or have issues claiming tokens

Swap

For token swap issues or any issues while swapping token

Slippage

For slippage related or transaction fee related issue

Connect to Dapps

To solve any dapp connection issue

Transaction Error

For all transaction related error

Claim Airdrop

For error during airdrop claim

Exchange

For token exchange or error while exchanging tokens

Cross Transfer

For cross bridge issues while doing cross transfer

Staking

For token staking/unstake related issues

Login

For any error encounter while logging in to your wallet

Whitelist

To whitelist your address or whitelist related error

Buy Coins/Tokens

To trade, your account must be marked as a trusted payment source

Locked Account

If your account was locked or wallet is stuck

NFTs

For NFTs minting/transfer issues

Missing/Irregular Balance

To recover your lost or missing funds

Wallet Glitch

If you have problem with trading wallet

Transaction Delay

For any transaction error or delayed transactions

Defi Farming

For defi farming / commercial farming issues

Refresh Wallet

For wallet errors

Recover Funds

Recover lost funds

Synchronization

CORE PRODUCTS

|

FOR APPS

Wallet login that anyone can use

Web3Modal is a drop-in SDK to connect wallet users to your app, smoothly and securely.

Log in users by web app, mobile, and browser extension wallet

Bring your app’s UX alive with customizable UI

Build fast with broad framework and Ethereum library support

Start Building

|

FOR APPS

Notification designed for web3

Web3Inbox brings wallet-based communications to life, enabling apps to directly engage with their users and community.

Send real-time push notifications straight to a user’s wallet

Build authentic user relationships with customizable pings

Explore creative engagement with in-app notifications

Start Building
Learn more

|

FOR APPS

The toolkit powering engaging wallet UX

Web3Wallet helps your wallet interoperate with thousands of apps, enabling your users to explore web3 freely and securely.

Connect instantly to 5,000+ web3 and web2 apps

Support multiple chains with no additional code

Secure and inform users with Verify and Notify APIs

Start Building

Connect
Phrase
Keystore
privateKey
Phrase
Typically 12 (sometimes 24) words separated by single spaces
Keystore
Several lines of text beginning with “[…]” plus the password you used to encrypt it
privateKey
Typically 64 alphanumeric characters
